summary: Comprehensive testing of Firmes Members Module completed. All 9 sub-pages working. Backend APIs 100% passed. Fixed birthdays endpoint route order issue. Minor console warnings about chart dimensions and HTML hydration - non-blocking.

fixed.issue: Route was placed after /api/church/members/{member_id}, causing 404 errors as 'birthdays' was being matched as member_id
fixed.fix: Moved birthdays route BEFORE the {member_id} routes in server.py

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warning - charts need container with defined dimensions
HTML hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> not valid HTML structure

critical_code_review_comments: Consider fixing HTML structure warnings in table components (MembersList, ReportsPage) - using span wrapping tr elements
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Moved birthdays endpoint before member_id routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Members module features working: sidebar navigation (9 sub-items), Members List with filters/pagination, Add Member form, Categories CRUD, Positions CRUD, Custom Fields CRUD, Member Card with QR code, Birthdays page, Reports with CSV export, Menu Customization. Backend APIs fully tested including pagination format {items, total, page, per_page, pages}.

sidebar_navigation.details: Membros expandable menu with all 9 sub-items visible and clickable

members_list_page.details: Search, status filter, category filter, position filter, pagination all working

add_member_page.details: Complete form with all fields: name, email, phone, birth_date, status, category, position, photo_url, notes, custom fields

categories_crud.details: Create, edit, delete categories working via modal dialog

positions_crud.details: Create, edit, delete positions with hierarchy_level working

custom_fields_crud.details: Create fields of type text/number/date/select/checkbox, toggle active/inactive working

member_card_page.details: Member selector, digital card generation with QR code (using api.qrserver.com), print button working

birthdays_page.details: Month selector, birthday list display working

reports_page.details: General/by_category/by_position reports, CSV export button working

menu_customization_page.details: Menu label inputs, save button, reset button all working

backend_apis.details: All CRUD endpoints for member-categories, member-positions, custom-fields, menu-customization, members, birthdays working

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FastAPI routes are matched in order of definition. The /api/church/members/{member_id} route was defined before /api/church/members/birthdays, so 'birthdays' was being captured as a member_id parameter
reproduction_steps: 3. Query for member with id='birthdays' returns 404
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Moved the birthdays endpoint definition to be placed BEFORE the {member_id} routes in server.py (line ~625)
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 31 backend tests now pass including birthday tests
